global.title: Tesla in-cabin camera fails to prevent 60 mph naps as Wisk Aero faces lawsuit
global.summary: On today’s surveillance-heavy episode of Quick Charge, it sure looks like Tesla’s in-cabin driver cam failed to stop one woman from falling asleep at the wheel, but safety and attention monitoring may not be the end game for that camera after all.

global.title: BMW’s iX4 EV captured with a new look as its debut nears [Images]
global.summary: The 2027 iX4 is set to join BMW’s electric vehicle lineup soon, bringing a new coupe SUV-like style to the family. Ahead of its debut, the 2027 BMW iX4 was spotted ripping around the Nürburgring, flaunting its new look.

global.title: Tesla app code reveals cabin camera will verify driver before FSD
global.summary: Code buried in Tesla’s latest iOS app update points to a new feature that would use the in-car cabin camera to verify a driver’s identity before allowing “Full Self-Driving” to activate. If the system can’t confirm the person behind the wheel matches an authorized profile, it would block FSD and sur

global.title: Kia is killing off its flagship sedan as it shifts to more efficient, lower-cost EVs
global.summary: Kia is trading in its flagship sedan after 14 years to focus on smaller, more affordable electric vehicles.

global.title: Tesla Cybercab: mass-producing a car it can’t sell or drive itself
global.summary: Tesla is ramping up production of the Cybercab at Giga Texas, with more than 100 of the steering-wheel-less two-seaters already spotted in the factory’s outbound lots. The problem is that Tesla can’t sell it to you, and it can’t yet drive itself without a human watching — which raises the obvious qu

global.title: Amazon slashes $410+ off Worx 1/4-acre robot mower, 50% drop on Anker SOLIX S2000 power station, Autel level 2 EV charger $909, more
global.summary: Today’s 9to5Toys Green Deals is headlined by the 1/4-acre Worx Landroid robot lawn mower at more than $410 off, the new Anker SOLIX S2000 at nearly 50% off, as well as Autel’s MaxiCharger AC Pro level 2 charger down at $909. That’s just a few of the things you’ll find below, so keep on reading to fu

global.title: GM halts shipments and recalls nearly 15,000 Cadillac electric SUVs
global.summary: GM halted shipments and issued a recall for nearly 15,000 Cadillac Vistiq SUVs. The recall is due to faulty third-row seats that could trap passengers, similar to the issue with the Hyundai Palisade.

global.title: Jasion Hunter Pro review: A folding fat tire full-suspension e-bike for cheap
global.summary: For some companies, the budget e-bike market has become a race to cram as many headline-worthy specs as possible into a bike without crossing the psychologically important $1,000 mark. Bigger motors, bigger batteries, higher speeds, full suspension – they’re all showing up on bikes that would have s

global.title: Hyundai’s electric SUVs are winning over buyers, and it’s easy to see why
global.summary: The IONIQ 5 is one of the most popular EVs right now outside of Tesla, and now Hyundai’s three-row electric SUV is finding its niche.

global.title: BYD’s flagship electric sedan receives 65,000 locked-in orders
global.summary: The Seal 08 boasts “the power of a million-dollar vehicle,” but can be bought for under $30,000 in China. After it went on sale last week, locked-in orders for BYD’s new flagship electric sedan reached around 65,000 in its first 30 hours.
